hero.title:
WEB
DEVELOPER
hero.description: Building digital experiences that are bold, fast, and unforgettably brutalist.

cards.title: THE STORY
cards.content: I transform complex problems into elegant, high-impact digital solutions. With a focus on performance and raw aesthetic, I push the boundaries of what's possible on the web.

cards.title: THE APPROACH
cards.content: Neo-brutalism isn't just a style; it's a statement. I believe in transparency, bold choices, and technical excellence in every line of code.
